collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + DailyMed/OpenFDA label contraindications + CDC cross-reactivity guidance
validation_rule: Every included drug must be a penicillin-class antibacterial or have label evidence linking it to penicillin hypersensitivity.
notes: Core trap-patient group; includes amoxicillin and related penicillins.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + DailyMed/OpenFDA labels + CDC cross-reactivity guidance
validation_rule: Do not auto-block all cephalosporins for penicillin allergy; keep generation/side-chain/reaction-history review note.
notes: Needed for beta-lactam cross-reactivity logic.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + CDC beta-lactam guidance
validation_rule: Treat as beta-lactam review, not automatic contraindication unless label/reaction history supports it.
notes: Needed for broader beta-lactam allergy safety.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + label review
validation_rule: Validate manually because cross-reactivity rules differ from other beta-lactams.
notes: Useful once hospital antibiotics are added.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + AAAAI cross-reactivity guidance
validation_rule: Include antibacterial sulfonamides only; do not mix with sulfonylureas, loop diuretics, thiazides, or celecoxib.
notes: Prevents broad false sulfa allergy alerts.

collection_method: Manual curated class mapping + AAAAI guidance
validation_rule: Must be tagged as review/no-auto-contraindication for sulfonamide antibiotic allergy.
notes: Includes sulfonylureas and some diuretics as review examples.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + NICE NSAID allergy guidance
validation_rule: Separate non-selective NSAIDs from aspirin/salicylates and COX-2 selective agents when possible.
notes: Core community-pharmacy allergy group.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + NICE NSAID allergy guidance
validation_rule: Aspirin/salicylate allergy should cross-review with non-selective NSAIDs.
notes: Needed for aspirin trap and NSAID cross-reactivity.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + NICE NSAID allergy guidance
validation_rule: Keep separate from non-selective NSAIDs; specialist review may allow use in some NSAID-allergic patients.
notes: Avoids overly broad NSAID allergy blocks.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + label hypersensitivity warnings
validation_rule: Validate class membership and retain severe-reaction caution.
notes: Covers ciprofloxacin and later quinolones.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + label hypersensitivity warnings
validation_rule: Same-class allergy alerts require reaction history; true allergy is less common.
notes: Covers clarithromycin, azithromycin, erythromycin.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + label hypersensitivity warnings
validation_rule: Validate class membership and label evidence.
notes: Needed beyond current 30-drug test set.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + label hypersensitivity warnings
validation_rule: Validate class membership and retain same-class review note.
notes: Needed as antibiotic coverage grows.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + label hypersensitivity warnings
validation_rule: Class membership is small; validate manually.
notes: Covers metronidazole.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + label hypersensitivity warnings
validation_rule: Separate systemic azoles from topical-only agents when possible.
notes: Covers fluconazole and later antifungals.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + label warnings for angioedema
validation_rule: ACE-inhibitor angioedema should trigger same-class avoidance/review; distinguish from cough.
notes: Clinically important even if not classic IgE allergy.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + label review
validation_rule: Keep separate from ACE inhibitors; review after ACE-inhibitor angioedema instead of auto-blocking.
notes: Needed for broader cardiovascular meds.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + label contraindications/warnings
validation_rule: Separate hypersensitivity and heparin-induced thrombocytopenia concepts where schema allows.
notes: High-risk anticoagulant allergy/adverse immune reaction group.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + NICE drug-allergy documentation guidance
validation_rule: Differentiate allergy from nausea, constipation, sedation, or histamine-mediated itching.
notes: Prevents false opioid allergy positives.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + label review
validation_rule: Track excipient-related reactions when known.
notes: Needed for insulin glargine and future insulin products.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + label SCAR warnings
validation_rule: Severe cutaneous adverse reactions should be high-risk and not treated as mild intolerance.
notes: Covers carbamazepine/valproate and future antiseizure meds.

collection_method: RxNorm/RxClass class members + label review
validation_rule: Keep separate from side effects; use only for documented hypersensitivity.
notes: Covers omeprazole and later PPIs.

collection_method: DailyMed/RxClass where available + guideline review
validation_rule: Do not confuse iodine/seafood myths with contrast reactions; requires separate documentation.
notes: Useful future extension, not central to community prescriptions.
